purpose_digest: OpenAI-compatible proxy + policy engine: content-type 인지 (text/json/code/log) + pluggable compressor registry + CCR-lite(SQLite) + provider router. MVP는 Python-only FastAPI, fixture-based regression.

session.current_baseline: TASK-002-1 done — project skeleton (pyproject + src + tests + docker-compose + Dockerfile + README + venv). 다음 session은 TASK-002-2 (FastAPI app + OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint mock) 부터 시작.
session.current_axis: TASK-002 MVP 1차 cycle — HTTP proxy skeleton + auth + provider router + Provider Registry (test/list_models/cache) + fixture regression. 한 session = 한 sub-task 사이클 권장.
